name: pdf-resume
description: A Chrome and Brave extension that remembers reading position in local PDFs.

scripts.lint: node --check background.js && node --check shared/local-pdf-url.mjs && node --check shared/position-update-messaging.mjs && node --check storage/books.mjs && node --check popup/popup-entry.mjs && node --check viewer/viewer-entry.mjs && node --check viewer/viewer-app.mjs && node --check viewer/pdfjs-position-tracking.mjs && node --check viewer/position-save-controller.mjs && node --check viewer/viewer-boot.mjs && node --check viewer/viewer-url.mjs && node --check viewer/viewer-view.mjs && node --check scripts/check-format.mjs && node --check test/books-storage.test.mjs && node --check test/extension-contract.test.mjs && node --check test/position-tracking.test.mjs && node --check test/support/chrome-storage-fake.mjs && node --check test/support/fake-scheduler.mjs
scripts.check: npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm test
